About.Name: Fatimah Mohammed
About.AboutText:
Hi, I am Fatimah Mohammed. I am a passionate Electrical Engineering student with a keen interest in PCB and coding. Currently, I am pursuing my undergraduate degree at Seattle Pacific University. I am dedicated to expanding my knowledge and skills in various areas of computer science, with a particular focus on Electronics.

I enjoy tackling challenging circuit projects and I thrive in collaborative environments where I can contribute my expertise and learn from my peers.

Beyond the classroom, I believe in the importance of continuous learning and seek out opportunities to explore new technologies and methodologies.

Experience.ExperienceText: I am currently pursuing a degree at Seattle Pacific University while building hands-on experience through engineering and technical projects. My work has focused on circuit design, simulation, programming, and problem solving, with projects involving MATLAB, LTspice, and software development. Through coursework and practical experience, I have developed a strong foundation in analysis, design, and troubleshooting, and I continue to build skills that prepare me for roles in engineering and technology.
Experience.EducationText: My education at Seattle Pacific University has given me experience in circuit analysis, electronics, programming, and engineering design. I have applied these concepts in projects involving active filters, simulation tools, and technical problem solving, which have strengthened both my theoretical understanding and practical skills.
Experience.EmploymentText: In addition to my coursework, I have worked on technical assignments and design projects that required careful analysis, documentation, and simulation. These experiences have strengthened my ability to solve engineering problems, communicate technical results, and work through projects from initial calculations to final verification.
Experience.SkillsText: My technical skills include circuit design and simulation, MATLAB analysis, LTspice modeling, and programming in C++, JavaScript, Node.js, HTML, and CSS. I am especially interested in combining hardware and software skills to solve practical engineering problems and create well-documented technical work.

Project1.Title: 4th-Order Sallen-Key Bandpass Filter Design
Project1.Desc:
Designed and analyzed a 4th-order active bandpass filter centered at 25 kHz using two cascaded Sallen-Key stages. Verified the transfer function in MATLAB and compared the simulated frequency response in LTspice at the pass frequency and stop frequencies. The project includes design calculations, Bode plots, and circuit schematics.

Tools used: MATLAB, LTspice, and hand calculations.
